title: Inspect data frame structure
description: Report dimensions, column classes, factor levels, and NA counts to ground data decisions.
body: Use when reasoning about an unfamiliar data frame in R. Actions: run str() or glimpse() and summary() to report dimensions, each column's class, factor levels, and per-column NA counts; surface any unexpected factor or character coercion. Do not propose transformations without first reporting the actual column types and missingness. This skill is read-only and exposes capability only; it must not mutate the frame without runtime permission. Validation signals include a concrete class-and-NA breakdown per column. Risk boundary: if a numeric column has been coerced to factor, flag it before any arithmetic relies on it.
